decisions.rationale: The observation's base_record_id 'project_nostrand-rogers-sbs' already exists in the registry and refers to the same Nostrand Ave / Rogers Ave Select Bus Service project. The source '201110_nostrand_cb8_slides' is already listed in the registry record's source_ids, and the record_alias 'project_nostrand-rogers-sbs-201110-cb8' is already registered. The observation label, borough, project_type, and description all match. No new linkage is needed — the observation is already correctly resolved to its base record.
